LABEL.TOOLTIP: Add a glow around the character's mesh.

LABEL.TEXT: Voice Chat Push to Talk Key

LABEL.TOOLTIP: Load 3D models only when needed, improve performance. Restart necessary.

BUTTON.TOOLTIP: Load 3D models only when needed, improve performance. Restart necessary.
Toggle use of modern crosshair customization.
Toggle the top line of the crosshair.
Toggle the left line of the crosshair.
Toggle the bottom line of the crosshair.
Toggle the right line of the crosshair.
